pull.title: testrand: Remove testrand_finish
pull.body: This removes printing of the "random run = " at the end of the tests. I haven't seen a single case where this proved to be useful. And as of 48789dafc2a866bbc639184f0387637c0decb8c5, this is anyway printed only at the end of the exhaustive tests and not the normal tests, so the probability that this will be useful in the future is very low.

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

events.message:
testrand: Remove testrand_finish

This removes printing of the "random run = " at the end of the tests. I
haven't seen a single case where this proved to be useful. And as of
48789dafc2a866bbc639184f0387637c0decb8c5, this is anyway printed only at
the end of the exhaustive tests and not the normal tests, so the
probability that this will be useful in the future is very low.
